test-suite.name: Pester
C:\Users\pj\.ralph\sessions\ralph-skill-20260225-111231\worktree\install.tests.ps1
Source-to-destination path mappings
Source-to-destination path mappings.Repo source directories referenced by installer exist on disk
test-suite.description: Source-to-destination path mappings.Repo source directories referenced by installer exist on disk

test-case.name: Source-to-destination path mappings.Repo source directories referenced by installer exist on disk.skill source: claude/skills/ralph/
Source-to-destination path mappings.Repo source directories referenced by installer exist on disk.command source: claude/commands/ralph/
Source-to-destination path mappings.Repo source directories referenced by installer exist on disk.prompt source: copilot/prompts/
Source-to-destination path mappings.Repo source directories referenced by installer exist on disk.runtime config source: ralph/config.yml
Source-to-destination path mappings.Repo source directories referenced by installer exist on disk.runtime bin source: ralph/bin/
Source-to-destination path mappings.Repo source directories referenced by installer exist on disk.runtime templates source: ralph/templates/

test-suite.name: Source-to-destination path mappings.Command source contains exactly 5 command files per SPEC.md
test-suite.description: Source-to-destination path mappings.Command source contains exactly 5 command files per SPEC.md

test-case.name: Source-to-destination path mappings.Command source contains exactly 5 command files per SPEC.md.contains setup.md
Source-to-destination path mappings.Command source contains exactly 5 command files per SPEC.md.contains start.md
Source-to-destination path mappings.Command source contains exactly 5 command files per SPEC.md.contains status.md
Source-to-destination path mappings.Command source contains exactly 5 command files per SPEC.md.contains stop.md
Source-to-destination path mappings.Command source contains exactly 5 command files per SPEC.md.contains steer.md

test-case.description: has exactly 5 command files (no extras, no missing)
test-case.name: Source-to-destination path mappings.Command source contains exactly 5 command files per SPEC.md.has exactly 5 command files (no extras, no missing)

test-suite.name: Source-to-destination path mappings.Copilot prompt source has expected .prompt.md files

test-case.description: has exactly 5 .prompt.md files (no extras, no missing)
test-case.name: Source-to-destination path mappings.Copilot prompt source has expected .prompt.md files.has exactly 5 .prompt.md files (no extras, no missing)

test-suite.name: Source-to-destination path mappings.Copy-TreeItem calls in script wire correct source paths
test-suite.description: Source-to-destination path mappings.Copy-TreeItem calls in script wire correct source paths

test-case.name: Source-to-destination path mappings.Copy-TreeItem calls in script wire correct source paths.skill source path is "claude\skills\$skillName"
Source-to-destination path mappings.Copy-TreeItem calls in script wire correct source paths.command source path is "claude\commands\$skillName"
Source-to-destination path mappings.Copy-TreeItem calls in script wire correct source paths.prompt source path is "copilot\prompts"
Source-to-destination path mappings.Copy-TreeItem calls in script wire correct source paths.runtime config source is "$skillName\config.yml"
Source-to-destination path mappings.Copy-TreeItem calls in script wire correct source paths.runtime bin source is "$skillName\bin"
Source-to-destination path mappings.Copy-TreeItem calls in script wire correct source paths.runtime templates source is "$skillName\templates"

test-suite.name: Harness definitions
Harness definitions.Four harnesses with correct id/order and HasCommands flags
test-suite.description: Harness definitions.Four harnesses with correct id/order and HasCommands flags

test-case.description: defines ids: claude, codex, copilot, agents (in order)
test-case.name: Harness definitions.Four harnesses with correct id/order and HasCommands flags.defines ids: claude, codex, copilot, agents (in order)

test-case.description: HasCommands = $true only for claude and codex (first two)
test-case.name: Harness definitions.Four harnesses with correct id/order and HasCommands flags.HasCommands = $true only for claude and codex (first two)

test-suite.name: Harness definitions.Skill destinations target ~/.{harness}/skills/$skillName for each harness
test-suite.description: Harness definitions.Skill destinations target ~/.{harness}/skills/$skillName for each harness

test-case.name: Harness definitions.Skill destinations target ~/.{harness}/skills/$skillName for each harness.claude -> ~/.claude/skills/$skillName
Harness definitions.Skill destinations target ~/.{harness}/skills/$skillName for each harness.codex -> ~/.codex/skills/$skillName
Harness definitions.Skill destinations target ~/.{harness}/skills/$skillName for each harness.copilot -> ~/.copilot/skills/$skillName
Harness definitions.Skill destinations target ~/.{harness}/skills/$skillName for each harness.agents -> ~/.agents/skills/$skillName

test-suite.name: Harness definitions.Command destinations target only claude and codex
test-suite.description: Harness definitions.Command destinations target only claude and codex

test-case.name: Harness definitions.Command destinations target only claude and codex.claude -> ~/.claude/commands/$skillName
Harness definitions.Command destinations target only claude and codex.codex -> ~/.codex/commands/$skillName
Harness definitions.Command destinations target only claude and codex.copilot harness sets CmdDest = $null
Harness definitions.Command destinations target only claude and codex.agents harness sets CmdDest = $null

test-suite.name: Harness definitions.Runtime destination is ~/.aloop/

test-case.name: Harness definitions.Runtime destination is ~/.aloop/.aloopDir resolves to $HOME/.aloop
Harness definitions.Runtime destination is ~/.aloop/.config copies into $aloopDir
Harness definitions.Runtime destination is ~/.aloop/.bin copies into $aloopDir
Harness definitions.Runtime destination is ~/.aloop/.templates copy into $aloopDir

test-suite.name: Post-install summary and usage text
Post-install summary and usage text.Installed-components block

test-case.description: Skill line references all 4 harness directories
test-case.name: Post-install summary and usage text.Installed-components block.Skill line references all 4 harness directories

test-case.description: Commands line lists exactly: setup, start, status, stop, steer
test-case.name: Post-install summary and usage text.Installed-components block.Commands line lists exactly: setup, start, status, stop, steer

test-case.description: Commands line restricts to claude and codex (not copilot or agents)
test-case.name: Post-install summary and usage text.Installed-components block.Commands line restricts to claude and codex (not copilot or agents)

test-case.description: Prompts line references VS Code and aloop-*.prompt.md
test-case.name: Post-install summary and usage text.Installed-components block.Prompts line references VS Code and aloop-*.prompt.md

test-suite.name: Stale directory cleanup

test-case.name: Stale directory cleanup.removes legacy .copilot/commands/aloop directory
Stale directory cleanup.removes legacy .agents/commands/aloop directory

test-suite.name: Installer behavioral branches

test-case.description: supports -DryRun path and reports dry-run mode in summary
test-case.name: Installer behavioral branches.supports -DryRun path and reports dry-run mode in summary

test-case.description: supports -Force path and creates runtime/config targets
test-case.name: Installer behavioral branches.supports -Force path and creates runtime/config targets

test-case.description: copies commands only for harnesses where HasCommands is true
test-case.name: Installer behavioral branches.copies commands only for harnesses where HasCommands is true

test-case.description: covers no-harness summary variant for unknown harness values
test-case.name: Installer behavioral branches.covers no-harness summary variant for unknown harness values
